name: Bea
description:
• Congrats! You've managed to defeat another gym leader from Galar and earned the fighting badge. It doesn't end here though, because the mighty gym leader seems to have seen strength in you, and invited you to a sparring match to test your real strength, this time not involving any Pokemon. You decide how it ends up.
